{"analysis":"The /app directory is on an overlay filesystem (Docker). There's a subdirectory `/app/varsea`. I have debugfs, extundelete, grep, find, and strings available. Let me explore further - check the varsea directory, look for deleted file traces in the overlay, search raw disk, check bash history, etc.","plan":"1. Explore /app/varsea directory contents
2. Check bash history for any traces
3. Try to grep raw block devices for the password pattern
4. Look for overlay upper layer whiteout files or deleted file markers","commands":[{"keystrokes":"find /app -type f 2>/dev/null
","duration":0.5},{"keystrokes":"cat ~/.bash_history 2>/dev/null
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"ls -la /app/varsea/
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"find /app -name '*.txt' -o -name '*launchcode*' -o -name '*password*' 2>/dev/null
","duration":0.5}]}
